description: Copy of a receipt of payment for two months of ground rent (ḥikr) in Qasr al-Shamʿ issued to the elder Abū Ḥasan b. Efrayim b. Maḥfūẓ, written by Ismaʿīl b. Ḍiyā. The total payment was 1/4 dinar in cash. Dated: Jumādā II 439 AH, which is 1047 AH. (The payments themselves were for Rabīʿ ī and Rabīʿ II 439 AH.) (Information from CUDL and Khan.)
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
